V-M-009.checks: User frontend still builds, matches the Phase-28 auth API response shape, makes registration mobile-safe without implying active KrotPN trial before email verification, and resumes valid stored sessions across tabs within the 60-day idle TTL.
V-M-009.commands: pass-local 2026-06-05: frontend build, Phase-72 smoke, and session-security smoke passed for Russian invalid-login localization, Russian-only Settings, logout-under-Settings navigation, mobile dock reachability, compact calendar, and protected-surface guard.
V-M-009.anchors: TYPESCRIPT_NO_ERRORS REGISTER_PENDING_STATE REGISTER_VERIFIED_SUCCESS REGISTER_EXPIRED_LINK REGISTER_RESEND_AVAILABLE PHASE45_SUBSCRIPTION_COUNTDOWN PHASE46_PASSWORD_EXAMPLE PHASE46_MTPROTO_LINKS PHASE51_BRAND_ASSETS PHASE52_MATRIX_VISUAL_SHELL PHASE53_USER_MATRIX_ROUTES PHASE56_PUBLIC_AUTH_ROUTES PHASE59_MATRIX_MOTION

phase-28-frontend-gates.gate-1: Register submit handles pending/check-email response without storing access tokens or marking the user authenticated.
phase-28-frontend-gates.gate-2: Verify-email route handles success, expired token, replayed token, and resend-needed states with compact mobile layouts.
phase-28-frontend-gates.gate-3: Frontend copy clearly states that free trial and VPN config become available after email verification.
phase-28-frontend-gates.gate-4: Existing login, refresh, logout, dashboard, config, and subscription flows continue to build against the shared API client.

phase-44-frontend-gates.gate-1: Register pending state includes spam-folder guidance and removes stale 3-day trial/immediate VPN copy.
phase-44-frontend-gates.gate-2: Forgot/reset password routes exist and bind to the Phase-44 auth API methods.
phase-44-frontend-gates.gate-3: Client-side password strength hints match the backend minimum policy shape.
phase-44-frontend-gates.gate-4: Duplicate-email errors show a recovery CTA.

phase-45-frontend-gates.gate-1: Dashboard shows pending trial as config-access state without claiming the countdown has started.
phase-45-frontend-gates.gate-2: Subscription page renders server-derived days/hours/minutes and active date range.
phase-45-frontend-gates.gate-3: Subscription calendar highlights active dates and does not show stale 3-day trial copy.

phase-46-frontend-gates.gate-1: Register form renders a format-only password example imported from the shared password policy helper.
phase-46-frontend-gates.gate-2: Dashboard separates Telegram app tg://proxy link from browser https://t.me proxy link.
phase-46-frontend-gates.gate-3: MTProto visible labels are localized as Ссылка, Сервер, Порт, and Секрет.
phase-46-frontend-gates.gate-4: MTProto status badge refresh is bounded at 30 seconds and avoids background polling.

phase-51-frontend-gates.gate-1: User frontend index.html references real favicon.ico and 16x16/32x32 PNG favicon fallbacks.
phase-51-frontend-gates.gate-2: Vite PWA includes existing favicon and apple-touch-icon assets without referencing missing mask-icon.svg.
phase-51-frontend-gates.gate-3: User frontend public build contains pwa-192x192.png, pwa-512x512.png, and brand/email-logo.png.
phase-51-frontend-gates.gate-4: Visible page logos are deferred until the planned frontend redesign; Phase-56 is the approved public/auth logo integration point.

phase-52-frontend-gates.gate-1: App mounts VisualShell around the existing user route tree without changing route structure, auth state, or API clients.
phase-52-frontend-gates.gate-2: MatrixBackground renders a fixed pointer-events-none canvas with resize, cleanup, fallback, and reduced-motion guards.
phase-52-frontend-gates.gate-3: User index.css exposes Matrix tokens, scanline/vignette/content layers, focus-visible rules, and reduced-motion policy.
phase-52-frontend-gates.gate-4: Chrome mobile/desktop screenshots show the login shell remains readable above the Matrix layer.

phase-53-frontend-gates.gate-1: Auth screens keep existing API calls, spam hint, duplicate-email recovery CTA, password example, reset-token handling, and verification states while adopting Matrix forms.
phase-53-frontend-gates.gate-2: Dashboard, config, subscription, referrals, and settings routes build and render under VisualShell without route changes or API shape changes.
phase-53-frontend-gates.gate-3: Phase-53 smoke must check 360x740, 390x844, 430x932, 768x1024, and 1440x900 viewports for no document-level horizontal scroll and no obvious text/control overlap.
phase-53-frontend-gates.gate-4: Chrome screenshots must cover auth and reduced-motion states; protected dashboard/config/subscription/referrals/settings route surfaces are covered by static smoke when local preview has no authenticated backend session.

phase-53-commands.command-3: Chrome screenshot audit for /login, /register, /reset-password, desktop /login, and reduced-motion /login with virtual-time-budget.
phase-53-commands.command-4: git diff --name-only -- install.sh deploy nginx docker-compose.yml

phase-56-frontend-gates.gate-1: Public / route exists and protected user cabinet routes live under /dashboard with legacy redirects for /config, /subscription, /referrals, and /settings.
phase-56-frontend-gates.gate-2: Landing, login, register, forgot-password, reset-password, and verify-email routes keep Matrix styling readable and show the public logo asset.
phase-56-frontend-gates.gate-3: Verified-email guard copy remains explicit and no access token is stored before successful verify-email.
phase-56-frontend-gates.gate-4: Public tariff preview remains aligned with M-068 and does not create payment or own checkout amount/metadata.

phase-59-frontend-gates.gate-1: User VisualShell and MatrixBackground expose route, reduced-motion, pointer-scroll, focus, and inactive-tab lifecycle markers.
phase-59-frontend-gates.gate-2: Dashboard, Config, and Referrals expose compact copy/download/proxy feedback and status transition classes without API changes.
phase-59-frontend-gates.gate-3: Phase-59 smoke confirms no scroll hijack, pointer interception, long motion budget, secret logging, or protected backend/deploy/runtime diff.

phase-67-frontend-gates.gate-1: Frontend build must pass after splash/auth route changes.
phase-67-frontend-gates.gate-2: / must render only a splash-logo flow and redirect to /login without marketing/tariff/product sections.
phase-67-frontend-gates.gate-3: /login, /register, /forgot-password, and /reset-password must preserve existing auth API calls, token storage boundaries, pending verification state, duplicate-email recovery CTA, password example, and reset-token handling.
phase-67-frontend-gates.gate-4: Phase-67 smoke must fail if visible matrix-auth-card framing, removed helper copy, visible above-field labels, or blue/cyan auth focus treatment returns.
phase-67-frontend-gates.gate-5: Protected backend, deploy/install, nginx, docker-compose, VPN, MTProto, billing, and admin surfaces must remain untouched.

session60-frontend-gates.gate-1: /login must call fetchUser for an existing valid stored session and redirect to /dashboard with replace=true.
session60-frontend-gates.gate-2: Login and verify-email must persist tokens through persistUserSessionTokens instead of duplicating direct token writes.
session60-frontend-gates.gate-3: API and auth store must enforce the 60-day idle TTL and refresh last-seen timestamps on authenticated activity.

phase-67-verification-levels.module-local: Phase-67 smoke validates route wiring, removed-copy contracts, auth API/store preservation, MatrixBackground browser guards, BrandMark usage, CSS markers, and protected-surface diffs.
phase-67-verification-levels.wave-level: Phase-56 public/auth, Phase-60 QA, Phase-61 responsive, Phase-63 logo, Phase-52 visual, and Phase-59 motion smokes remain green.
phase-67-verification-levels.phase-level: Frontend build, XML parse, MyGRACE lint, git diff --check, and protected backend/deploy/runtime guard pass before execution can be accepted.

phase-67-telemetry-requirements.allowed: Route path, viewport label, selector marker, removed-copy check name, auth-flow invariant name, canvas branch, build size, and protected-surface diff summary.
phase-67-telemetry-requirements.forbidden: Passwords, emails, access/refresh tokens, reset/verify token query values, API keys, VPN configs, MTProto secrets, proxy links, payment IDs, and server credentials.

scenarios.scenario-1: Registration shows check-email state and no authenticated dashboard redirect.
scenarios.scenario-2: Verification success routes the user into the normal authenticated onboarding path.
scenarios.scenario-3: Expired or replayed token state remains understandable and offers resend.
scenarios.scenario-4: Frontend builds with zero TypeScript errors.
scenarios.scenario-5: Password recovery screens build and static smoke passes.
scenarios.scenario-6: Phase-53 user route matrix renders Matrix style on auth, dashboard, config, subscription, referrals, and settings without changing API contracts.
scenarios.scenario-7: Matrix visual redesign hides primary VPN, MTProto, subscription, password recovery, or config actions on phone viewports.
scenarios.scenario-8: Phase-67 splash/auth polish preserves frontend auth behavior while removing the landing content and visible auth card frames.
scenarios.scenario-9: Phase-67 route polish changes backend/auth API contracts, deploy surfaces, or protected user cabinet routes.

phase-67-autonomous-execution-safety.allowed: Frontend user public/auth routes, user frontend CSS, user BrandMark/MatrixBackground/VisualShell compatibility edits, Phase-67 smoke, and MyGRACE docs.
phase-67-autonomous-execution-safety.blocked: Backend auth semantics, auth API shape, protected user cabinet behavior, admin panel behavior, billing, VPN, MTProto, deploy/install scripts, nginx, docker-compose, TLS/DNS, and release operations.
phase-67-autonomous-execution-safety.handoff-trigger: Stop if the requested UX requires backend/API changes, a new asset not already available, or unverifiable browser behavior.

V-M-009.evidence: 2026-06-01: cd frontend && npm run build and node scripts/phase44-auth-email-ux-smoke.mjs passed for Phase-44 password recovery UX. 2026-06-01: Phase-45 frontend build and subscription UX smoke passed for pending-trial copy, countdown fields, calendar marker, and stale 3-day copy guard. 2026-06-01: Phase-46 frontend build and user-cabinet UX smoke passed for password example, dual MTProto links, Russian labels, and bounded status refresh. 2026-06-02: Phase-51 frontend build passed and brand asset smoke --expect-dist confirmed favicon/PWA/email-logo assets in dist. 2026-06-03: Phase-52 frontend build, Matrix visual smoke, and Chrome screenshots for /login at 360x740, 390x844, 430x932, 1440x900, plus reduced-motion 390x844 passed. 2026-06-03: Phase-53 frontend build and node scripts/phase53-user-matrix-ui-smoke.mjs passed; production-preview screenshots passed for login/register/reset mobile, login desktop, and reduced-motion login with virtual-time-budget. 2026-06-03: Phase-56 frontend build, public/auth smoke, Phase-44/46/50/52/53/55 regressions, public/auth Chrome screenshot matrix, XML/MyGRACE/diff checks, and protected deploy/install guard passed. 2026-06-04: Phase-59 frontend build, motion smoke, Phase-52/55/56/57 regressions, post-commit Phase-58 smoke, XML parse, MyGRACE lint, git diff --check, and protected backend/deploy/runtime guard passed. 2026-06-04: Phase-67 frontend build, auth/splash smoke, Phase-44/46/52/55/56/59/60/61/62/63 regressions, browser screenshots for splash/login/register/forgot/reset desktop/mobile/reduced-motion, admin build, XML/MyGRACE checks, git diff --check, and protected backend/deploy/runtime guard passed. 2026-06-04: session60 follow-up passed frontend build plus Phase-28/53/56/67/session smokes for verify-email frameless style, login stored-session redirect, and session-helper token persistence.
V-M-009.phase-68-execution-evidence: 2026-06-04: Phase-68 frontend build, dashboard/subscription smoke, Phase-45/50/53/57/62 regressions, Phase-60 QA, and protected backend/deploy/runtime guard passed for compact dashboard ownership.

phase-68-verification-design.scope: Frontend route and API contract verification for dashboard/subscription merge.
phase-68-verification-design.gate-1: User dashboard route must request the existing auth/profile/subscription/MTProto/referral APIs without changing API paths.
phase-68-verification-design.gate-2: /dashboard/subscription route must remain compatible or redirect intentionally without breaking existing deep links.
phase-68-verification-design.gate-3: Frontend API types must keep existing backend field names for plans, subscription countdown, MTProto proxy, and referral data.
phase-68-verification-design.commands: cd frontend && npm run build; node scripts/phase68-dashboard-subscription-smoke.mjs; node scripts/phase60-premium-qa-smoke.mjs

phase-69-verification-design.scope: Frontend API and UX verification for referral bonus and masked invite identity.
phase-69-verification-design.gate-1: Referral pages must consume masked referred identity from backend or mask locally from an allowed partial field without exposing full email.
phase-69-verification-design.gate-2: Referral bonus status must not claim active days until backend subscription state confirms activation/extension.
phase-69-verification-design.commands: cd frontend && npm run build; node scripts/phase69-referral-bonus-smoke.mjs

V-M-009.phase-69-evidence: 2026-06-04: frontend build passed; scripts/phase69-referral-bonus-smoke.mjs passed for masked referral identity, no "Реферал #N" primary label, access_label typed API, and referral-bonus pending copy.

phase-70-verification-design.scope: Frontend API and config route verification for QR parity.
phase-70-verification-design.gate-1: Config download, text fetch, QR modal, copy actions, and MIME-safe .conf flow must remain API-compatible.
phase-70-verification-design.gate-2: QR smoke and backend tests must compare rendered/frontend/backend/CLI payload sources without printing config bodies or key material.
phase-70-verification-design.commands: cd frontend && npm run build; node scripts/phase70-config-qr-parity-smoke.mjs

V-M-009.phase-70-evidence: 2026-06-04: frontend build and scripts/phase70-config-qr-parity-smoke.mjs passed for level-M QR settings, preserved download/copy/config API flows, compact config page markers, and protected deploy/runtime guard.

phase-71-verification-design.scope: Frontend API, i18n, and user-cabinet route verification for per-device config retrieval.
phase-71-verification-design.gate-1: deviceApi must expose selected-device config, download, QR, and optional Amnezia QR methods with typed responses and without breaking existing create/rotate/revoke/list APIs.
phase-71-verification-design.gate-2: English language mode must not leak the known hardcoded Russian strings in Settings, Config, SubscriptionPanel, and Layout controlled labels.
phase-71-verification-design.gate-3: Frontend smokes must not print full config payloads, private keys, selected-device config text, auth tokens, or real emails.
phase-71-verification-design.commands: cd frontend && npm run build; node scripts/phase71-device-config-master-detail-smoke.mjs; node scripts/phase70-config-qr-parity-smoke.mjs

V-M-009.phase-71-evidence: Frontend build passed; Phase-71 smoke passed for deviceApi selected-device methods, config master-detail markers, i18n cleanup, QR close icon, sticky actions, and protected deploy/runtime diff guard; Phase-70 QR parity smoke remained green.

phase-72-verification-design.scope: Frontend auth and user-cabinet route verification for invalid-login localization, navigation reachability, Settings language removal, and compact calendar presentation.
phase-72-verification-design.gate-1: /login must render "Неверный логин или пароль" for invalid credentials and must not render "Invalid email or password".
phase-72-verification-design.gate-2: Login error mapping must remain frontend-only unless backend auth contract changes are explicitly approved.
phase-72-verification-design.gate-3: Layout, Settings, SubscriptionPanel, Dashboard, and route registration must continue to build after removing visible language settings and adding mobile bottom navigation.
phase-72-verification-design.gate-4: Smoke output must not print passwords, access tokens, refresh tokens, real emails, or backend auth responses containing credentials.
phase-72-verification-design.commands: cd frontend && npm run build; node scripts/phase72-user-auth-navigation-smoke.mjs; node scripts/session-security-smoke.mjs

V-M-009.phase-72-evidence: Frontend build passed; scripts/phase72-user-auth-navigation-smoke.mjs passed for localized invalid-login handling, Russian-only Settings cleanup, desktop/mobile navigation markers, compact calendar markers, and protected admin/backend/deploy/runtime guard; scripts/session-security-smoke.mjs remained green.
